meta.title: Temperature-dependent expression of the chromosomal beta-lactamase gene in a strain of Pseudomonas aeruginosa -- Hewinson and Nichols 24 (3): 263 -- Journal of Medical Microbiology

abstractHtml: A strain of Pseudomonas aeruginosa (3-Post) was resistant to cefsulodin and ceftazidime at 37 degrees C but sensitive at 20 degrees C. Resistance was mediated by chromosomally-encoded beta lactamase which was synthesised at a high level during growth above 30 degrees C but at a low, inducible level during growth below 27 degrees C.
